home.hero_subtitle: DLX Solution helps organizations redesign workflows, reduce operational friction, and adopt practical AI to improve efficiency, clarity, and scalability.
home.outcome_3: Modernize systems with practical automation and AI
home.outcome_4: Align operations with measurable business performance
home.service_1_desc: Identify workflow bottlenecks, operational gaps, and improvement opportunities.
home.service_2_desc: Design a practical roadmap for workflow redesign, automation, and AI integration.
home.service_3_desc: Launch targeted transformation initiatives with measurable operational outcomes.
home.service_4_desc: A streamlined package to establish your business presence with a website, business email, and LinkedIn company page.
home.modernize_intro: We help organizations modernize operations through a structured approach that focuses on practical execution and measurable outcomes.
home.modernize_list_2: redesigning processes for efficiency and clarity
home.modernize_list_3: applying automation and AI where they create real value
home.modernize_list_4: supporting adoption so improvements are sustained
home.phase_1: Phase 1 — Diagnostic: Assess workflows, bottlenecks, and operational priorities.
home.phase_2: Phase 2 — Modernization Blueprint: Define improvement opportunities and implementation strategy.
home.phase_3: Phase 3 — Pilot Implementation: Launch a focused initiative to validate modernization outcomes.
home.phase_4: Phase 4 — Advisory: Optional ongoing support to scale and refine improvements.
home.timeline: Typical engagement timeline: 8–13 weeks depending on scope.
home.why_dlx_text: We combine operational insight, modern technology thinking, and disciplined execution to help organizations transform how work actually gets done.
home.why_dlx_text2: Our approach focuses on practical modernization—improving workflows, strengthening accountability, and building systems that scale with the organization.
home.mission_text: To help organizations modernize operations by reducing workflow friction, improving efficiency, and applying technology and AI where they create real business value.
home.vision_text: To be a trusted partner for organizations seeking practical, disciplined modernization in an increasingly AI-enabled world.
home.value_worldclass_desc: We pursue excellence in both thinking and execution.
home.value_impact_desc: We focus on initiatives that deliver measurable operational improvement.
home.value_nimble_desc: We adapt quickly and work pragmatically to move modernization forward.
home.cta_subtitle: If your organization is exploring operational modernization, workflow redesign, or AI-enabled transformation, we would be glad to discuss how DLX Solution can help.
home.launch_kit_hook: More professionals are starting something of their own. The problem isn't the idea — it's the first few steps.
home.launch_kit_pitch: A practical setup that helps founders move from idea to professional presence in just a few days.
home.launch_kit_goal: Help new founders launch with a clean, professional foundation.

about.title: About DLX Solution
about.subtitle: Design. Lead. Transform. | 德立新集团
about.intro: DLX partners with operationally intensive companies to modernize workflows, reduce manual friction, and unlock efficiency through practical, AI-enabled process transformation.
about.founder_role: Founder & CEO, DLX Solution | 德立新集团
about.founder_bio: Daisy Lee founded DLX Solution with a vision to connect innovative AI-driven operational solutions with businesses seeking measurable growth. Under her leadership, DLX has become a trusted partner for organizations navigating intelligent enterprise modernization.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Architecting Intelligent Enterprise Modernization
services.phase_1_items: End-to-end workflow mapping, bottleneck analysis, quantified inefficiency assessment, risk exposure mapping, executive opportunity report
services.phase_2_items: Target-state workflow design, AI & automation integration roadmap, ROI modeling, prioritized implementation plan
services.phase_3_items: Deployment of selected automations, KPI tracking dashboard, team enablement & training, measurable impact report
services.phase_4_items: Monthly KPI review, continuous improvement roadmap, expansion recommendations
